prompts.body: If you woke up with a super power tomorrow, what would it be?
prompts.subtext: What would you do with it? How would the day go?

prompts.body: Describe the ultimate beach trip you'd take this summer.
prompts.subtext: Where would you go? Who would you take? What are the top 3 things you'd want to do?

prompts.body: Invent a new holiday. What's it called, and how do people celebrate it?
prompts.subtext: The weirder the better.

prompts.body: Describe a place you've never been but are sure you'd love.
prompts.subtext: What does it look, sound, and smell like in your imagination?

prompts.body: What's something you're really good at that most people don't know about?
prompts.subtext: Shhh! I won't tell anyone!

prompts.body: It's Fathers Day! What's 1 thing you love about your dad and 1 thing you wish you could change?
prompts.subtext: Serious or silly... up to you.

prompts.body: Tell me a story about an imaginary creature that you saw at camp.
prompts.subtext: What does it look like, where does it live, what does it eat?

prompts.body: Describe a tiny moment recently when you felt completely happy.
prompts.subtext: The more ordinary, the better.

prompts.body: Tell me six of the best things about a road trip.
prompts.subtext: Think about the journey, not the destination...

prompts.body: Describe your perfect Saturday morning in ridiculous detail.
prompts.subtext: What do you hear, smell, eat? Who's there?

prompts.body: You find a door in your house you've never noticed before.
prompts.subtext: Open it. Where does it lead? Tell me everything on the other side.

prompts.body: What's the best thing you've eaten so far this summer?
prompts.subtext: I need all the details: when, where, what, why was it great?

prompts.body: Introduce me to one of your friends!
prompts.subtext: What's best about them? Where did you meet? Is there a secret you share?

prompts.body: If your pet could talk for just 1 hour, what would they say to you?
prompts.subtext: Real pet or imaginary. What have they been dying to tell you?

prompts.body: Tell me about a time you were braver than you felt.
prompts.subtext: It still counts even if your knees were shaking the whole time.

prompts.body: Invent a gadget that would make your life way easier.
prompts.subtext: What does it do, what's it called, and why does everyone secretly need one?

prompts.body: What's a tiny thing that drives you absolutely bananas?
prompts.subtext: Go on a proper rant. Make it as dramatic as you like.

prompts.body: What's a smell that instantly takes you somewhere else?
prompts.subtext: Where does it take you — and who's there when you arrive?

prompts.body: Who's someone that quietly makes your life better?
prompts.subtext: Get specific — the little things they do that you might never say out loud.

prompts.body: You're in charge of the whole world for one day. What's your first rule?
prompts.subtext: What changes? What does everyone have to do — or stop doing?

prompts.body: You can invite anyone to dinner — alive, gone, or made up. Who?
prompts.subtext: What do you eat, and what's the first thing you ask them?

prompts.body: Design your dream room from scratch — no budget, no rules.
prompts.subtext: What's in it? What's the single wildest thing you'd add?

prompts.body: What's something that makes you laugh every single time?
prompts.subtext: A joke, a memory, a video, a person — why does it always get you?

prompts.body: If you could instantly master one skill, what would it be?
prompts.subtext: Why that one? And what's the very first thing you'd do with it?

prompts.body: What's the best way to spend a totally empty, do-nothing day?
prompts.subtext: No plans, no rush. Walk me through your perfect kind of nothing.

prompts.body: Write a note to yourself for next summer.
prompts.subtext: What do you want future-you to remember about right now?
